sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Fidelity Fundamental Large Cap Growth ETF
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed profile of the Fidelity Fundamental Large Cap Growth ETF (FFLG), including its price, dividend information, expense ratio, holdings, and performance metrics. It also features concentration analysis, ESG scores, and technical indicators, offering a comprehensive overview for potential investors. The report positions the ETF within the broader equity market, comparing it to peers and highlighting its significant holdings in major technology companies.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Partners PRECISE To Advance Singapore’s Landmark SG100K Biobank Study
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has announced a strategic collaboration with Precision Health Research, Singapore (PRECISE) to further the SG100K biobank study. This partnership aims to integrate multi-omics and AI-driven analytics, utilizing Thermo Fisher's Olink® Proximity Extension Assay platforms and Orbitrap Astral mass spectrometry system to accelerate early disease detection, biomarker discovery, and precision medicine. The collaboration highlights the growing trend of national population studies leveraging proteomics to gain real-time insights into disease biology and transform human health.

feed.title: eBay Opens The NYC Edit Market, an IRL Experience Where Selling Unlocks Access to Shopping
feed.summary: eBay is launching "The NYC Edit Market," a three-day in-person retail experience in SoHo, New York City, where entry requires attendees to list an item for sale on eBay. This market will feature pre-loved fashion items from style insiders and top eBay sellers, inspired by eBay's online "The NYC Edit" guide. The event aims to bring eBay's circular fashion economy to life through interactive shopping, selling, and authentication experiences, with a portion of proceeds benefiting Custom Collaborative.

feed.title: Freshpet Stock Climbs 3% as TD Cowen Raises Rating On Strong Sales
feed.summary: Freshpet (FRPT) stock rose 3% after TD Cowen upgraded the company to Buy, setting an $80 price target, driven by strong fiscal 2025 results where the company surpassed $1 billion in annual revenue and achieved positive free cash flow a year early. Despite a challenging pet food market, Freshpet outgrew the category, maintained market share, and expanded margins, leading analysts to believe the worst is over and the company's growth trajectory is back on track. The upgrade highlights Freshpet's improving fundamentals, new retail strategies, and a stronger balance sheet, suggesting significant upside from its current trading price below the target.

feed.title: Autodesk launches Product Help MCP Server to bring trusted documentation to AI assistants
feed.summary: Autodesk has launched the Product Help MCP Server, a new read-only service that allows external AI agents to securely access Autodesk's extensive help documentation for over 110 products. This initiative aims to provide AI assistants with trusted, up-to-date information, thereby enhancing their ability to deliver accurate answers and support faster learning and problem-solving for customers. Autodesk emphasizes that connecting powerful large language models with high-quality, product-specific knowledge is crucial for creating reliable and useful AI experiences.

feed.title: Fifth Third Recognized Among 2026 USA Today Top Workplaces
feed.summary: For the fifth consecutive year, Fifth Third has been recognized with the 2026 USA TODAY Top Workplaces award, based on employee feedback. The bank also received several Top Workplaces Culture Excellence Awards, including for Appreciation, Employee Well-Being, and Leadership. This recognition highlights Fifth Third's commitment to fostering a people-first culture and its dedication to its employees, customers, and communities.

feed.title: P&G PRO Introduces Mr. Clean PRO: The Dependable New Employee With a Full Cleaning Portfolio to Get the Job Done
feed.summary: P&G PRO is launching Mr. Clean PRO, a new line of professional-grade cleaning products designed to address common pain points for businesses. A survey found that 85% of professionals experience challenges with surface cleaning solutions, and 74% find their current products ineffective against grease and grime. The new Mr. Clean PRO line, which includes all-purpose, degreasing, all-surface, and deep cleaners, aims to offer more effective and efficient commercial cleaning solutions.

feed.title: ServiceNow embeds AI across the platform with Context Engine
feed.summary: ServiceNow is enhancing its platform with AI capabilities through a new "Context Engine," which integrates enterprise data, policies, and decision history to power AI-driven workflows. This move positions ServiceNow as an enterprise AI operating layer, offering new tools like Build Agent Skills and an SDK to attract developers, while also introducing an ESM Foundation for easier adoption by mid-sized businesses. CIOs are advised to consider the implications of vendor convergence and potential cost complexities from consumption-based pricing models.

feed.title: Virtue® Labs Expands Retail Footprint to Nearly 600 Ulta Beauty Locations, Fueled by Strong Guest Demand
feed.summary: Virtue® Labs, a biotech haircare company, has significantly expanded its presence in Ulta Beauty, adding over 230 new stores to reach nearly 600 locations nationwide. This expansion, representing a 62% increase since its initial launch, is driven by strong consumer demand for its science-backed, hair-healing products. The brand's products, including the new Strength & Shield Leave-In Conditioner, will now be more widely accessible in-store and online at Ulta Beauty, further enhancing its market reach and catering to guests seeking effective hair care solutions.

feed.title: DuPont Expands FilmTec™ Fortilife™ Portfolio for Advanced ZLD/MLD and resource recovery applications
feed.summary: DuPont has launched two new FilmTec™ Fortilife™ reverse osmosis membrane elements, the XC-Max UHP and XC220, to enhance water recovery and optimize Zero Liquid Discharge (ZLD) and Minimal Liquid Discharge (MLD) systems. These new elements are designed to help industrial customers achieve higher brine concentrations, reduce liquid waste, and lower overall costs, addressing increasing global water scarcity and stricter discharge regulations. The expansion aims to provide more sustainable and economically attractive solutions for water treatment and resource recovery.

feed.title: Office leasing tops pre-pandemic pace as Q1 volume reaches 120M sq. ft.
feed.summary: U.S. office leasing volume in Q1 2026 reached an estimated 120 million square feet, surpassing pre-pandemic levels and marking the highest quarterly total since mid-2018. This 25% year-over-year increase was primarily driven by a large number of transactions rather than a few significant deals, indicating a shift in leasing activity patterns. Charlotte and New York City exhibited strong recovery, fueled by financial institutions and, in NYC's case, continued leasing by AI-related technology firms.

feed.title: Sold-out margarita mix returns to Costco West in a new glass bottle
feed.summary: Edna’s Non-Alcoholic Cocktail Co.'s popular Margarita Mix is returning to Costco Wholesale locations across Western Canada, featuring new premium glass bottles. The product, which previously sold out in 2025, is crafted with premium ingredients and developed by an award-winning mixologist. It will be available in a two-pack for $13.99 for a limited time.

feed.title: The Rosen Law Firm, P.A. Provides this Final Reminder of the Proposed Class Action Settlement on Behalf of Purchasers of Cummins Inc. Publicly-Traded Common Stock - CMI
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm, P.A. has issued a final reminder about a proposed class action settlement for purchasers of Cummins Inc. (NYSE: CMI) publicly-traded common stock between February 11, 2019, and December 21, 2023. A settlement fairness hearing is scheduled for May 21, 2026, to consider a $1,600,000.00 settlement. Class members must submit a claim form or exclusion request by April 23, 2026.

feed.title: ServiceNow says it's 'AI-enabling' its entire product suite to turbocharge enterprise automation
feed.summary: ServiceNow announced a comprehensive overhaul of its product lineup, with every service, platform, and product now "AI-enabled" to boost agentic automation in enterprises. The company aims to move businesses beyond experimental AI to an "AI-native architecture" by integrating its AI Control Tower and Workflow Data Fabric across its offerings. A new "Context Engine" is designed to unify fragmented tools and applications, providing deep business context for AI agents, while an SDK and "Build Agent Skills" offering will open the ecosystem to developers, catering to organizations of all sizes.

feed.title: Oxford BioTherapeutics signs collaboration with Bristol Myers Squibb
feed.summary: Oxford BioTherapeutics (OBT) has announced a multi-year collaboration with Bristol Myers Squibb (BMS) to discover and develop T-cell engager therapies for solid tumors. This agreement marks OBT's third major pharmaceutical partnership in 12 months, highlighting growing industry confidence in its OGAP-Verify platform. OBT will identify targets and generate development candidates, while BMS will handle subsequent research, development, and commercialization, with OBT receiving upfront payments, milestones, and royalties.

feed.title: Fate Therapeutics to Participate in Upcoming Second Quarter 2026 Conferences
feed.summary: Fate Therapeutics, Inc. announced its management will participate in five investor conferences during the second quarter of 2026, including virtual and in-person events like the Needham, Bank of America, H.C. Wainwright, Jeffries, and Goldman Sachs healthcare conferences. The company, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm, focuses on developing iPSC-derived cellular immunotherapies for cancer and autoimmune diseases. Webcasts of presentations, if available, will be on their website.

feed.title: Fate Therapeutics plans appearances at 5 investor conferences by June
feed.summary: Fate Therapeutics (NASDAQ: FATE) announced its management will participate in five investor conferences during Q2 2026, including the Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference, Bank of America Healthcare Conference, H.C. Wainwright BioConnect, Jefferies Global Healthcare, and Goldman Sachs Global Healthcare. Presentations or fireside chats may occur at these events, with live webcasts and archived replays available on the company's website. This follows a pattern of positive market reactions to conference and earnings announcements, contrasting with modest negative responses to routine equity awards.

feed.title: Wings chain adds a bacon cheeseburger, spicy pizza and cheesecake
feed.summary: Native Grill & Wings (FATAQ) has expanded its menu with new collaborations, introducing two entrees and two cheesecakes at participating locations. The savory additions include a Western Bacon Cheeseburger and a Spicy Hawaiian Pizza, while desserts from The Cheesecake Factory Bakery now feature Vanilla Bean and OREO Cookies & Cream cheesecakes. These new offerings are part of a partnership with the National Pork Board and The Cheesecake Factory Bakery, aiming to provide more variety to guests.

feed.title: Intuit says FedNow link can get business invoices paid 4x faster
feed.summary: Intuit (NASDAQ: INTU) has completed its FedNow® Service certification, enabling instant payment capabilities across its platform. This integration will help small and mid-market businesses get invoices paid up to four times faster, facilitate real-time payroll, and offer on-demand bill pay to avoid late fees. Intuit aims to accelerate the adoption of modern U.S. payment infrastructure and enhance cash flow management for its customers.

feed.title: Neurosurgeons get real-time imaging inside Medtronic’s navigation system
feed.summary: GE HealthCare announced the digital integration of its bkActiv intraoperative ultrasound system with Medtronic's Stealth AXiS surgical navigation system. This collaboration allows neurosurgeons to use real-time ultrasound imaging during cranial procedures to complement surgical planning and navigation workflows, addressing challenges like "brain shift" and enhancing surgical precision. The integrated system, cleared by the FDA for cranial procedures, will be showcased at the American Association of Neurological Surgeons Annual Scientific Meeting in May 2026.

feed.title: Seagate exits Lyve Cloud, takes Wasabi stake in storage deal
feed.summary: Wasabi Technologies is acquiring Seagate Technology's Lyve Cloud business. Under the agreement, Seagate will receive equity in Wasabi, becoming a shareholder, though financial terms beyond that were not disclosed. This acquisition aims to strengthen Wasabi's position as a pure-play cloud storage vendor and better serve enterprise customers with predictable pricing and strong security.

feed.title: Weaver Capital Management LLC Boosts Stake in International Business Machines Corporation $IBM
feed.summary: Weaver Capital Management LLC significantly increased its stake in International Business Machines (IBM) by 139.4% in the fourth quarter, now holding 4,409 shares valued at $1.306 million. Company insiders also made purchases, with directors acquiring 1,484 shares worth approximately $417,157. IBM outperformed earnings estimates with Q4 EPS of $4.52 and revenues of $19.69 billion, while maintaining a "Moderate Buy" analyst consensus with an average target price of $311.27.

feed.title: SLB OneSubsea awarded contract for Shenandoah Field
feed.summary: SLB OneSubsea has secured a contract from Beacon Offshore Energy (BOE) Exploration and Production LLC for an HPHT multiphase boosting system for the Shenandoah field in the Gulf of Mexico. This system is designed to operate above 15,000 psi, addressing extreme operating conditions in deepwater developments. The technology aims to accelerate production and enhance recovery in ongoing deepwater projects.

feed.title: Executives gather at 11 Wall Street for NYSE sustainability summit
feed.summary: The New York Stock Exchange announced its fourth annual Sustainability Leaders Summit will convene executives at 11 Wall Street. This summit is part of a daily pre-market update that also covers market context, commodity shifts like ICE Brent crude, and tech movers such as Meta Platforms. The update also highlights companies ringing the opening and closing bells.

feed.title: The Kraft Heinz Co stock: Pausing split plans signals bold turnaround bet
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz has decided against splitting into two companies, choosing instead to invest $600 million into marketing, R&D, and product improvements to address its US challenges. This strategic shift, announced by CEO Steve Cahillane, aims to prioritize profitability and internal fixes through initiatives like "Agile@Scale," with a focus on growing emerging markets and improving North American performance. For investors, this move presents a potential turnaround story backed by a strong dividend yield, while analysts remain cautiously optimistic regarding execution risks.

feed.title: Guggenheim Maintains Amgen(AMGN.US) With Hold Rating, Raises Target Price to $351
feed.summary: Guggenheim has reiterated its Hold rating on Amgen (AMGN.US) and increased its price target to $351. This adjustment reflects the analyst's updated valuation for the biotechnology company.

feed.title: Tractor Supply to host Demo Days in Minden April 25-26
feed.summary: Tractor Supply will host its annual Demo Days event in Minden on April 25-26, offering customers the chance to test drive various lawn mowers. The event, held at 1090 Homer Road, will feature a barbecue food truck on the first day and provide free Tractor Supply hats for test drivers. It aims to let customers experience different mower brands like Toro, Bad Boy, and Cub Cadet on simulated terrains before making a purchase.

feed.title: Masco’s New US$1b Credit Facility And What It Means For Growth
feed.summary: Masco Corporation has secured a new $1 billion multicurrency revolving credit facility, extending its maturity to 2031 and increasing flexibility for future acquisitions, working capital, and general corporate needs. This refinancing reinforces Masco's capacity for growth and shareholder returns, despite existing concerns about its debt levels. Investors should monitor how Masco utilizes this facility, particularly for acquisitions, and track its leverage and interest coverage against covenant thresholds.

feed.title: OFI Invest Asset Management Boosts Stake in Yum! Brands
feed.summary: OFI Invest Asset Management has acquired a new position in Yum! Brands, purchasing over 154,000 shares worth approximately $23.4 million in Q4 2025. This significant investment signals confidence in Yum! Brands' growth prospects, aligning with increased institutional interest in the parent company of KFC, Pizza Hut, and Taco Bell.

feed.title: Invesco Ltd: Form 8.3 - Aptitude Software Group PLC; Opening Position disclosure
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. has filed a Form 8.3 disclosure regarding its opening position in Aptitude Software Group PLC. The disclosure shows Invesco Ltd. owns and/or controls 1,166,066 relevant securities, representing 2.13% of Aptitude Software Group PLC, as of April 8, 2026. This form is required for persons with interests in relevant securities representing 1% or more of an offeror/offeree under Rule 8.3 of the Takeover Code.

feed.title: TD Cowen Adjusts Invesco Price Target to $27 From $34.50, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: TD Cowen has lowered its price target for Invesco (IVZ) to $27 from $34.50 but has maintained a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes despite the price target reduction, indicating continued confidence in the asset management company's performance. The article also notes recent movements in Exchange-Traded Funds and other analyst revisions for Invesco.

feed.title: TD Cowen Adjusts Raymond James Financial PT to $156 From $181, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: TD Cowen has adjusted its price target for Raymond James Financial (RJF) shares to $156 from $181, while maintaining a Hold rating on the stock. This revision comes amidst a series of similar adjustments from other financial institutions, including UBS, Barclays, JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, BMO Capital, and Jefferies, all modifying their price targets for Raymond James Financial. The company specializes in various financial and investment services, retail and corporate banking, and asset management across the US, Canada, and Europe.

feed.title: ON Semiconductor Corp. Opens with a 5.82% Gain, Outperforming S&P 500's 2.51% Increase
feed.summary: ON Semiconductor Corp. opened with a notable 5.82% gain, outperforming the S&P 500's 2.51% increase and showing a 20.24% increase over the past month. Despite this strong market performance, the company has faced challenges with six consecutive quarters of negative results, a 39.43% decline in net profit, and low operating cash flow. Its high price-to-earnings ratio of 44.00 further suggests an expensive valuation given these difficulties.

feed.title: Analog Devices, Inc. Opens with a 5.62% Gain, Outperforming S&P 500
feed.summary: Analog Devices, Inc. (ADI) opened with a significant 5.62% gain, outperforming the S&P 500. The company demonstrates strong financial health with a low Debt to EBITDA ratio, impressive sales and operating profit growth, and high institutional ownership. ADI has consistently outperformed the S&P 500 over various timeframes, including a 47.14% return in the last year.

feed.title: Western Digital Corp. Opens with 7.04% Gain, Outperforming S&P 500's 2.51% Increase
feed.summary: Western Digital Corp. has started the day with a strong 7.04% gain, significantly outperforming the S&P 500's 2.51% increase. The company shows robust financial health, with record operating cash flow, high returns on capital and equity, and a low debt-to-equity ratio, contributing to an impressive 556.98% return over the past year. High institutional holdings further demonstrate confidence in its strong market position and fundamentals.

feed.title: Equitable Holdings, Inc. (EQH) Stock Forecasts
feed.summary: The article "Equitable Holdings, Inc. (EQH) Stock Forecasts" on Yahoo Finance appears to be minimally populated. The content is primarily navigation links and boilerplate Yahoo Finance elements, with an "Oops, something went wrong" message and "Error in retrieving data" frequently present, indicating that the actual stock forecast information for EQH was not loaded or available.

feed.title: State Street expands partnership with Thornburg to support new ETF share classes
feed.summary: State Street Corporation has expanded its nearly 40-year partnership with Thornburg Investment Management, Inc. to provide end-to-end servicing support for Thornburg’s new ETF share classes. This move broadens access to Thornburg’s active investment strategies and marks only the second active ETF share-class servicing mandate in the US for State Street. The expanded mandate includes comprehensive ETF servicing, building on their existing relationship which covers mutual funds, ETFs, closed-end funds, and UCITS vehicles.

feed.title: Nafion Market size to exceed $1.73 Billion by 2035 | DuPont de Nemours, Inc., Chemours Company, Solvay S.A., Asahi Kasei Corporation, 3M Company
feed.summary: The Nafion market is projected to grow from $1.02 billion in 2025 to approximately $1.73 billion by 2035, driven by demand in energy, chemical processing, and environmental technologies. North America is expected to lead this growth, while Asia Pacific will see the fastest expansion. Key trends include the acceleration of the hydrogen economy, advancements in fuel cell technologies, a focus on sustainability, and expanded industrial applications for Nafion.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams Kentucky Expansion More Than Doubles Capacity of Coil Coatings Plant
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams Coil Coatings has completed a significant expansion of its Bowling Green, Kentucky manufacturing plant, more than doubling its coil coatings capacity. This upgrade, incorporating state-of-the-art technology and automation, aims to meet the escalating demand in the metal roofing and construction markets. The expansion will enhance supply chain resilience, improve product delivery times, and bolster the company's ability to produce high-performance polyester and siliconized modified polyester coatings.

feed.title: OFI Invest Asset Management Boosts Stake in United Rentals
feed.summary: OFI Invest Asset Management significantly increased its stake in United Rentals, Inc. by over 22,900% to 40,283 shares valued at $32.6 million during the fourth quarter. This substantial increase signals strong institutional confidence in the construction equipment rental company's long-term prospects and the broader construction sector. Investors will be monitoring United Rentals' upcoming earnings report for performance and outlook.

feed.title: Banks are treading carefully on stablecoins despite market growth, S&P Global says
feed.summary: Banks are approaching stablecoins with caution despite the market's rapid growth to over $300 billion, according to S&P Global Market Intelligence. Most U.S. lenders are in a "wait-and-see" mode, with only 7% of smaller institutions developing frameworks and none actively piloting stablecoin capabilities due to concerns about deposit risks, competitive pressures, and unclear revenue impacts. While larger banks may explore issuing tokenized deposits, smaller ones are likely to act as intermediaries, requiring significant upgrades to legacy systems for multi-rail payment networks.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Cruises (NYSE:RCL) Price Target Lowered to $310.00 at Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has lowered its price target for Royal Caribbean Cruises (NYSE:RCL) to $310.00 from $330.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating, despite a higher MarketBeat consensus target of $350.55 and a "Moderate Buy" analyst consensus. The adjustment follows insiders selling 1.97 million shares and recent stock rallies driven by fuel-price relief and geopolitical easing, although risks like fuel hedging and competitive pressures remain. The company recently reported quarterly EPS of $2.80 and authorized a $2.0 billion share buyback program.

feed.title: MH & Associates Securities Management Corp ADV Buys Newmont Corporation Shares
feed.summary: MH & Associates Securities Management Corp ADV has purchased a new stake of 39,055 shares in Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM) during the fourth quarter of 2025, valued at approximately $3.9 million. This investment, representing 3.2% of the firm's portfolio, indicates confidence in Newmont's growth potential and the broader gold mining industry. Newmont is a leading global gold producer, and institutional investor interest in such a major player reflects ongoing interest in the gold mining sector.

feed.title: Campbell’s Is Shutting Down Operations at Longtime Texas Factory (Are More To Come?)
feed.summary: Campbell's is ceasing soup production at its Paris, Texas, factory, resulting in 205 layoffs as the plant transitions to focus on sauces like Prego and Pace. This change, years in the making, reflects evolving consumer preferences and modernization within the food industry. It raises concerns about potential broader shifts and highlights the importance of financial adaptability for workers and communities affected by such industry transformations.

feed.title: Consumers Energy Expands Efforts to Provide Energy Savings to Vulnerable Customers in Michigan
feed.summary: Consumers Energy is increasing its investment by $22 million by 2030 to expand energy-saving programs for income-qualified customers in Michigan, aiming to reduce their monthly bills through home energy upgrades. The company's "Helping Neighbors" program will be central to this effort, with a focus on communities like Flint and Kalamazoo, and will also address health and safety issues in homes that hinder energy efficiency. Additionally, Consumers Energy is promoting assistance programs like CARE, which offers payment forgiveness and shut-off protection.

feed.title: TX-SLB
feed.summary: SLB (NYSE: SLB) announced that its SLB OneSubsea joint venture has been awarded a contract by Beacon Offshore Energy (BOE) Exploration and Production LLC. The contract is for the delivery of a high-pressure, high-temperature multiphase boosting system. This system is intended for the Shenandoah field located in the Gulf of America.

feed.title: OFI Invest Asset Management Boosts Cummins Stake by 14,839%
feed.summary: OFI Invest Asset Management has significantly increased its stake in Cummins Inc. (NYSE:CMI) during the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 59,358 shares to now hold a total of 59,758 shares valued at $30.5 million. This substantial increase of 14,839.5% suggests the firm sees considerable growth potential in Cummins, a major industrial company. The move could indicate broader optimism within the industrial sector.

feed.title: DNA Sequencing Market Leading Players Analysis - Abbott
feed.summary: The global DNA Sequencing Market is experiencing significant growth, projected to register a 20% CAGR from 2025 to 2031, driven by technological advancements, expanding clinical applications, and increased investment in genomics research. Key players include Abbott Laboratories, Agilent Technologies, and Danaher Corporation, with North America dominating and Asia-Pacific emerging as a high-growth region. The market is fueled by applications in clinical diagnostics, agriculture, environmental science, and continuous genomics research funding.

feed.title: The Hartford Names Natalie Burns Head Of Enterprise Sales And Distribution
feed.summary: The Hartford has appointed Natalie Burns as the new head of Enterprise Sales & Distribution, effective May 1. In this role, she will be responsible for strengthening relationships with key distribution partners and fostering growth across business segments in Personal and Business Insurance, as well as Employee Benefits. Burns replaces Stephen Screen, who has transitioned to head of Alternative Placement Solutions within The Hartford's Global Specialty business unit.

feed.title: Only the second US active ETF share-class mandate goes to State Street
feed.summary: State Street Corporation has expanded its partnership with Thornburg Investment Management to provide comprehensive servicing support for Thornburg's new ETF share classes. This marks only the second active ETF share-class servicing mandate in the US, highlighting State Street's position as a leader in enabling clients to bring innovative products to market. The partnership, which began in 1987, will see State Street offer custody, accounting, ETF basket creation, and other services to support Thornburg's active investment strategies.
